overall.description: A truck driving simulation showing a Mercedes semi-truck navigating through heavy snowfall at night, entering a ferry terminal building, and approaching a ferry boarding area. The footage is from a game engine (Euro Truck Simulator 2) with high-quality winter weather effects and active windshield wipers.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway toward ferry terminal entrance with windshield wipers active

entered.detail: blue directional highway signs suspended over the road
large piles of plowed snow lining both sides of the highway
tall pole lights illuminating the snowy road

segments.scene_description: Driving on a snow-covered highway at night with heavy snowfall and active windshield wipers. Overhead blue highway signs are visible in the distance, and snow banks line both sides of the road.

events.description: truck enters indoor ferry terminal building from snowy highway
lighting shifts from dark snowy night to bright artificial indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: slowly driving through indoor terminal parking area navigating between concrete pillars

entered.detail: large concrete support pillars with yellow and black diagonal stripes
high concrete ceiling with industrial lighting fixtures
open space for vehicle maneuvering inside the terminal

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a large indoor ferry terminal structure with concrete floors and yellow-black striped pillars. The environment is artificially lit and completely sheltered from the snow.

events.description: exits indoor terminal back into snowy outdoor environment
truck makes left turn navigating terminal access roads

agents.ego_description: exiting the terminal building and navigating turns in the port area toward the coastal road

entered.detail: large industrial terminal structures with illuminated windows
chain-link fencing along the port perimeter

segments.scene_description: Exiting the terminal building back into the snowy night, the truck navigates through the port area with terminal buildings visible and makes a turn toward the coastal access road.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered coastal access road with guardrails

events.description: truck navigates winding snowy road with reduced visibility
snowfall intensifies further reducing visibility to near whiteout conditions

agents.ego_description: carefully driving on winding snow-covered road with guardrails, maintaining slow speed due to heavy snow

entered.detail: steel safety guardrails lining both sides of the winding road
fence marking the edge of the coastal area

segments.scene_description: Driving along a narrow, winding coastal road completely covered in deep snow. Metal guardrails line both sides and visibility is extremely poor due to intense snowfall and darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: ferry terminal check-in and boarding area

events.description: arriving at Stena Line ferry terminal with illuminated signage and buildings
approaching stop sign at ferry check-in area before boarding ramp

agents.ego_description: approaching ferry terminal check-in and proceeding toward the ferry boarding ramp

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'Stena Line' text indicating the ferry company
main terminal building with bright lights and check-in facilities
small structures for vehicle processing before boarding
inclined ramp leading up to the ferry vessel boarding deck

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the Stena Line ferry terminal, the truck approaches the check-in area with illuminated terminal buildings and signage visible through the snow, then proceeds toward the ferry boarding ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a treacherous snow-covered highway through a sheltered terminal and back into a blinding winter storm toward a ferry boarding ramp. It begins with the truck navigating a dark highway amidst heavy snowfall and active windshield wipers, passing under blue overhead signs and high snow banks. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters a large indoor ferry terminal, moving across concrete floors past yellow-and-black striped pillars under artificial lighting. As the truck exits the shelter and returns to the snowy night, it navigates the port area before turning onto a narrow, winding coastal road where visibility drops sharply against metal guardrails. Finally, the camera approaches the illuminated Stena Line terminal buildings and signage, proceeding through the intense snowfall toward the ferry boarding ramp.
